creator: rometravelers
caption:
Discover World’s Creepiest McDonald’s in Italy with @kj.cruisin!🤯🫣🇮🇹

💡A McDonalds in Frattocchie, a city about 12 miles south of Rome has a very unique feature to its building, back in 2014 when it was being built they discovered a 2000 year old Roman road that was home to THREE skeletons! The road was built in the 2nd century B.C., and the stretch beneath what is now a fast-food restaurant is around 150 feet long and seven feet wide. The amazing part is that McDonald’s actually contributed over $320,000 to the dig and archeologists believe that the road connects to the Appian Way, known to have been one of Ancient Rome’s busiest roads!

Send this to someone who didn’t know about this!🤯

📍McDonald’s, Frattocchie (about 12 miles southeast of Rome), Italy

transcription.text: Bro, I'm at McDonald's right now, right? We're in Rome. Keep that in mind. This is underneath the McDonald's and you just wait. It continues inside, brother. Door, please open. Here we go. Get ready for it. Get ready for it. Body. That's an absolute skeleton in a McDonald's.
